mapper.select: SELECT log.POLICY_LOG_NO AS policyLogNo, log.POLICY_NO AS policyNo, log.APRV_STATUS AS aprvStatus, COALESCE(u.DISPLAY_NAME, log.APRV_USER) AS displayName, log.APRV_TIME AS aprvTime, log.APRV_REMARK AS aprvRemark FROM tb_policy_aprv_log log LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON log.APRV_USER = u.USERNAME WHERE log.POLICY_NO = #{policyNo} ORDER BY log.APRV_TIME ASC
